title: RunDrift
description: Drift detection result emitted every run by LoopOrchestrator after comparing against baseline records.

trace_id.description: Trace ID of the current run.

generated_at_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this report was generated.

baseline_record_count.description: Number of baseline records used for comparison.

alerts.description: List of drift or regression alerts. Empty = clean.
